prestazioni: B58B30M0 (3.0L inline-6) Stage 2+ ECU flash via MHD with custom Dynojet-verified 480whp/520wtq map, utilizing a 3.5" VRSF downpipe with high-flow catalytic converter (200-cell) and a CSF intercooler with integrated charge pipe upgrade (aluminum, 3.5" diameter, reinforced with silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance)

Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, paired with a custom 3.5" turbo-back exhaust system from Akrapovič (Titanium, 70mm piping, dual 100mm outlets) and a secondary air injection delete kit from FTP Motorsport

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a ZF 8HP51 8-speed automatic transmission tune via xHP Stage 3 (with launch control, flat-foot shifting, and torque limiter removal), a P3 Carbon fiber driveshaft, and a 3.55:1 M Performance limited-slip differential with 40% lockup under load
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (G42-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with custom PPF matte wrap in BMW Frozen Portimao Blue, paired with a Vorsteiner V-GT 2.0 carbon fiber front splitter and a custom 3D-printed rear wing (dual-element, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle via hydraulic actuators)

OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber mirror caps, side skirts, and rear bumper inserts (painted to match), combined with a custom LED taillight delete (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals via Diode Dynamics) and a full carbon fiber hood from AC Schnitzer (Type 5, with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling)

Forgeline GA3R 20x9.5" ET25 (front) and 20x11" ET40 (rear) wheels in gloss black with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 305/25/20 rear), paired with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (2-way adjustable dampers, 30mm drop, custom valving for G42 chassis) and Brembo GT 6-piston front/4-piston rear big brake kit (400mm rotors, two-piece floating design, yellow calipers)
